name: Double Meeples
summary: Gain 2 ingredients instead of 1 when entering a cell occupied by another meeple.
stacking_notes: Stacks multiplicatively with other doubled-gain upgrades that apply to the same cell.
two_player_notes: Also applies to cells occupied by your own other meeple.

name: Diagonal Movement
summary: Meeple movement may use diagonal adjacency in addition to orthogonal adjacency.
stacking_notes: Changes legal adjacency; does not change ingredient quantity.

name: Double Corners
summary: Gain 2 ingredients instead of 1 when entering one of the four corner cells.
stacking_notes: Stacks multiplicatively with other doubled-gain upgrades that apply to the same cell.

name: Double Specialties
summary: Gain 2 ingredients instead of 1 when entering a caramel, chocolate, water, or tea cell.
stacking_notes: Stacks multiplicatively with other doubled-gain upgrades that apply to the same cell.
